calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-08-2015 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-23-2015 Set For Case Management Conference On Jun-24-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2015 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Mar-16-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. YEMI O. ODESANYA OF THE ODESSY LAW OFFICES, TEL. NO. (925)472-6556 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. MYRON MOYE OF THE HANSON BRIDGETT LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 777-3200 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT NORTHERN CALIFORNIA PRESBYTERIAN HOMES AND SERVICES' Motion for Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication - The court grants the motion for summary judgment. The undisputed evidence demonstrates that plaintiff cannot establish any of her causes of action. Defendant has shown that it took reasonable steps to prevent discrimination/harassment and conducted a good faith and reasonable investigation of plaintiff's claims of such misconduct. Defendant demonstrates a legitimate business reason for the adverse employment actions and plaintiff fails to present substantial responsive evidence of pretext. The negligent hiring claim fails because there is no evidence that defendant should have known that Ms. Spencer was an unfit employee. The declaratory relief cause of action cannot be established because that remedy is supposed to act prospectively, plaintiff's remedy is to pursue the other causes of action, and the claim is not necessary and proper in this case. See CCP 1061. The court notes that plaintiff's opposing separate statement purports to dispute certain facts, but the document does not include citations to the evidentiary record. The document is defective under CCP 437c(b)(3) and CRC 3.1350(h). Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/ehg
